question: What are the name and citizenship of the drivers who have driven the vehicle model 'DJ1'?
sql: SELECT driver.Name, driver.Citizenship FROM driver JOIN vehicle_driver ON driver.Driver_ID = vehicle_driver.Driver_ID JOIN vehicle ON vehicle_driver.Vehicle_ID = vehicle.Vehicle_ID WHERE vehicle.Model = 'DJ1';

back_translation.intent: 查询驾驶员的姓名和国籍，其中车辆型号为DJ1

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求查询驾驶车辆型号为'DJ1'的驾驶员姓名和国籍，SQL反向翻译描述中的意图、过滤条件（vehicle.Model = 'DJ1'）及目标列（Name, Citizenship）均完全匹配。虽然涉及三个表，但未出现歧义或矛盾。
